dashboard.title: Track Game Seasons in One Place
dashboard.subtitle: Track active game seasons, leagues, ladders, wipes, and cycles in one place. Stay up to date with current events, start and end dates, and never miss the next reset.
dashboard.officialTooltip: This date was officially announced by the developer.

news.title: ARPG News
news.subtitle: Latest news from the ARPG community — fetched via AI and cached hourly.
news.emptySubtitle: News is fetched via AI and cached for 1 hour. Try refreshing.

estimate.tooltip: Next {seasonType} date is estimated. We took the last 3–4 {seasonType}s, calculated the average duration ({days} days), and added it to the current {seasonType} start date.

popularity.label: Popularity
popularity.tooltip: Popularity index (0–100) based on active player count, Twitch viewership, and Steam charts. S = top tier, D = niche.

calendar.title: Season Calendar
calendar.subtitle: Upcoming season starts and ends across all tracked games.

hero.sub: Live countdowns for {count} competitive games — updated every second.

footer.disclaimer: Season data fetched via AI and cached hourly. Verify dates on official sites.

about.title: About SeasonPulse
about.intro: SeasonPulse is a free, community-driven tool that tracks active seasons, leagues, ladders, wipes, and cycles across popular online games.
about.whatText: We monitor season start and end dates, countdown timers, player statistics, and upcoming resets for games like Path of Exile, Diablo IV, Last Epoch, and more. All data is refreshed automatically every hour.
about.howText: Season data is fetched using AI-powered scrapers that monitor official game sources. Player counts come directly from Steam. Everything is cached and served instantly — no manual updates needed.
about.openText: SeasonPulse is completely free to use. No accounts, no tracking. We believe season information should be accessible to everyone.
about.contactText: Have feedback, found a bug, or want to suggest a game? Reach out via email.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: Your privacy matters. SeasonPulse is designed to be as privacy-friendly as possible.
privacy.collectText: We do not collect any personal data. No accounts are required, no cookies are used for tracking, and no analytics services monitor your behavior.
privacy.storageText: We use your browser's local storage only to save your preferences such as favorite games and display settings. This data never leaves your device.
privacy.thirdText: We embed Steam store widgets and fetch player data from Steam's public API. These requests go directly to Valve's servers and are subject to their privacy policy.
privacy.changesText: We may update this policy as needed. Any changes will be reflected on this page.

errors.notFoundText: The page you're looking for doesn't exist or has been moved.
errors.serverText: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again later.
